title: Taxonomy of Data Models
description: A hierarchical diagram classifying the major types of data models used in Database Management Systems, showing how they build upon one another from conceptual to physical implementation.
relationships: Conceptual Model is implemented by Logical Models
Logical Models are implemented by Physical Models
Hierarchical, Network, Relational, and Object-Oriented are types of Logical Models
Object-Relational and NoSQL are modern evolutions of these models
